---
title: "OC17 MAG Taxonomic Abundance - refined"
output: html_document
date: "2024-05-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)

library(ggplot2)
library(ggthemes)
library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(png)
library(pals)
library(gtools)
```

```{r}
rootdir = "/scratch/users/rsalcedo/OC17wc_deepauto/genome_based/"
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
coverm = read_csv(paste(rootdir, "refined_analysis/merged_coverM/refined_coverM_all_06152026.csv", sep = ""))
gtdb_info = read_csv(paste(rootdir, "refined_analysis/refined_gtdb/gtdb_summary_06152026.csv", sep = ""))
catabolism_MAGs = read_csv(paste(rootdir, "refined_analysis/refined_tables/catabolism_MAGs_06152026.csv", sep = ""), col_names = "genome")

genome_info = merge(gtdb_info, catabolism_MAGs, by = "genome")
```

```{r define color palettes}
c38 = c("#808080", "#d3d3d3", "#556b2f", "#a0522d", "#228b22", "#191970", "#8b0000", "#808000", "#008080", "#4682b4", "#9acd32", "#00008b", "#daa520", "#8fbc8f", "#8b008b", "#b03060", "#d2b48c", "#ff0000", "#00ced1", "#ff8c00", "#ffb6c1", "#0000cd", "#7fff00", "#9400d3", "#00ff7f", "#9370db", "#ff6347", "#ff00ff", "#1e90ff", "#f0e68c", "#dda0dd", "#90ee90", "#ff1493", "#ffa07a", "#ee82ee", "#87cefa", "#7fffd4", "#ffff00")

c26 <- c(
  "dodgerblue2", "#E31A1C", "green4", "#6A3D9A", "#FF7F00", "black", "gold1", "skyblue2", "#FB9A99", "palegreen2","#CAB2D6", "#FDBF6F", "gray70", "khaki2", "maroon", "orchid1", "deeppink1", "blue1", "steelblue4", "darkturquoise", "green1", "yellow4", "yellow3", "darkorange4", "brown", "#808080"
)
```

```{r}
length(unique(coverm$genome))
coverm$Sample = paste(coverm$site, coverm$depth, sep = "_")
length(unique(coverm$Sample))
```

```{r}
#remove genomes that are less than 50% covered
coverm_QC = filter(coverm, covered_fraction >= 0.50)

#group by sample, sum all genome coverage within a sample and make a new df that gives that total value for each sample
sample_cov = coverm_QC %>% 
  group_by(Sample) %>% 
  summarise(Mean = sum(Mean))

#append that value to the original df
coverm_QC = left_join(coverm_QC, sample_cov, "Sample")
#rename some things
coverm_QC = coverm_QC %>% 
  rename_with(~ "sample_cov", starts_with("Mean.y"))
coverm_QC = coverm_QC %>% 
  rename_with(~ "genome_cov", starts_with("Mean.x"))

#calculate the relative mean abundace of each genome in each sample using the previously calculated sample total coverage
coverm_QC$relative = coverm_QC$genome_cov/coverm_QC$sample_cov

length(unique(coverm_QC$genome))
length(unique(coverm_QC$Sample))
summary(coverm_QC$relative)
```

```{r}
#rename some things for plotting purposes
genome_info$kingdom = sub("\\;p.*", "", genome_info$classification)
genome_info$phylum = sub(".*p__", "", genome_info$classification)
genome_info$phylum = sub(".c__.*", "", genome_info$phylum)


genome_info$class = sub(".*c__", "", genome_info$classification)
genome_info$class = sub(".o__.*", "", genome_info$class)

genome_info$kingdom = sub(".*d__", "", genome_info$kingdom)

genome_info$order = sub(".*o__", "", genome_info$classification)
genome_info$order = sub("\\;f.*", "", genome_info$order)

genome_info$family = sub(".*f__", "", genome_info$classification)
genome_info$family = sub("\\;g.*", "", genome_info$family)

genome_info = genome_info %>% mutate(kingdom = ifelse(kingdom == "Bacteria", "B", kingdom))
genome_info = genome_info %>% mutate(kingdom = ifelse(kingdom == "Archaea", "A", kingdom))
genome_info = genome_info %>% mutate(phylum = ifelse(class == "Gammaproteobacteria", "Gammaproteobacteria", phylum))
genome_info = genome_info %>% mutate(phylum = ifelse(class == "Alphaproteobacteria", "Alphaproteobacteria", phylum))

```

```{r}

length(unique(genome_info$genome))
#combine the relative abundace of each genome in the total microbial community data with the taxonomic data of our chemoautotrophs

genome_coverage = merge(genome_info, coverm_QC, by = "genome")

#check which genomes are now included
#genome_coverage is now subsetted to just the autotrophs, but relative values are relative to total community
length(unique(genome_info$genome))
length(unique(genome_coverage$genome))
length(unique(coverm_QC$genome))
```


```{r}
#calculate the mean number of autotrophic phyla represented in each sample
genome_coverage = genome_coverage %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  mutate(phyla_count = n_distinct(phylum))

df2 = select(genome_coverage, c("Sample", "phyla_count"))
df2 = df2[!duplicated(df2), ]
df2$depth = df2$Sample
df2$site = df2$Sample

df2  = df2 %>%
  mutate(depth = case_when(
    endsWith(Sample, "_50") ~ "50",
    endsWith(Sample, "_150") ~ "150",
    endsWith(Sample, "_500") ~ "500",
    endsWith(Sample, "_1000") ~ "1000",
    endsWith(Sample, "_2000") ~ "2000",
    endsWith(Sample, "_3000") ~ "3000",
    endsWith(Sample, "_4000") ~ "4000")
  )
    
df2  = df2  %>%
  mutate(site = case_when(
    startsWith(Sample, "OC2") ~ "OC2",
    startsWith(Sample, "OC3") ~ "OC3",
    startsWith(Sample, "OC4") ~ "OC4",
    startsWith(Sample, "OC5") ~ "OC5",
    startsWith(Sample, "OC6") ~ "OC6")
  )

df2$depth = as.numeric(df2$depth)

average_phyla_by_depth <- df2 %>%
  group_by(depth) %>%
  summarise(mean_phyla_count = mean(phyla_count))

# Print the result
print(average_phyla_by_depth)

```

```{r}
#calculate the  number of autotrophic MAGs assessed in each sample
genome_coverage = merge(genome_info, coverm_QC, by = "genome")

genome_coverage = genome_coverage %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  mutate(MAG_count = n_distinct(genome))

df = select(genome_coverage, c("Sample", "MAG_count"))
df = df[!duplicated(df), ]
df$depth = df$Sample
df$site = df$Sample

df  = df %>%
  mutate(depth = case_when(
    endsWith(Sample, "_50") ~ "50",
    endsWith(Sample, "_150") ~ "150",
    endsWith(Sample, "_500") ~ "500",
    endsWith(Sample, "_1000") ~ "1000",
    endsWith(Sample, "_2000") ~ "2000",
    endsWith(Sample, "_3000") ~ "3000",
    endsWith(Sample, "_4000") ~ "4000")
  )
    
df  = df  %>%
  mutate(site = case_when(
    startsWith(Sample, "OC2") ~ "OC2",
    startsWith(Sample, "OC3") ~ "OC3",
    startsWith(Sample, "OC4") ~ "OC4",
    startsWith(Sample, "OC5") ~ "OC5",
    startsWith(Sample, "OC6") ~ "OC6")
  )

df$depth = as.numeric(df$depth)
```

```{r}
category_colors <- c(
  "Gammaproteobacteria" = "#B3CDE3",  
  "Alphaproteobacteria" = "#1F78B4", 
  "Thermoplasmatota" = "#3E8E41",    
  "Myxococcota_A" = "#6A3D9A",       
  "Planctomycetota" = "#CAB2D9",      
  "Actinobacteriota" = "#9467BD",    
  "Thermoproteota" = "#B2DF8A",      
  "Hydrogenedentota" = "#0066CC",    
  "Desulfobacterota_B" = "#F2F2F2",  
  "SAR324" = "#F1E3A1",               
  "Chloroflexota" = "#FED9A6",        
  "Marinisomatota" = "#FB9A99",      
  "JAAXHH01" = "#E31A1C",            
  "Cyanobacteria" = "#FDDAEC",      
  "Gemmatimonadota" = "#FDBF6F",    
  "Myxococcota" = "#FF7F00",        
  "Halobacteriota" = "#CCEBC5",      
  "UBA8248" = "#E377C2"              
)
```

```{r}
bar_totals=genome_coverage %>%
  group_by(site, depth) %>%
  summarise(
    total_height = sum(relative * 100, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

df$depth = as.character(df$depth)
bar_totals$depth = gsub("m","", bar_totals$depth)


label_df=bar_totals %>%
  left_join(df, by = c("site", "depth")) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0("n=", MAG_count))

label_df=label_df %>%
  mutate(depth = paste0(depth, "m"))
```

```{r}
aggregate=genome_coverage %>%
    group_by(Sample, phylum) %>%
    summarise(relative_pct = sum(relative*100), .groups = "drop") %>%
    ungroup()
```

```{r}
genome_coverage$depth = paste0(genome_coverage$depth, "m")
```

```{r}
#clean the white space off phylum names so it can sort properly
genome_coverage = genome_coverage %>%
  mutate(phylum = trimws(phylum))

# replace underscores and make phylum name lowercase
genome_coverage = genome_coverage %>%
  mutate(
    phylum_sort = tolower(gsub("_", " ", phylum))
  )

# use that cleaned phylum data to get alphabetical sorting
phylum_levels = genome_coverage %>%
  distinct(phylum, phylum_sort) %>% 
  arrange(phylum_sort) %>%
  pull(phylum) %>%
  unique() 

# factor those alphabetical phyla so it plots right
genome_coverage = genome_coverage %>%
  mutate(phylum = factor(phylum, levels = rev(phylum_levels)))

# Plot
plot = ggplot(genome_coverage, aes(fill = phylum, color = phylum, y = relative*100, x = depth)) + 
  geom_bar(position = "stack", stat = "identity") +
  facet_grid(~factor(site, levels = c("OC6", "OC5", "OC4", "OC3", "OC2"))) +
  coord_flip() +
  ylab("Relative % Autotrophic MAG abundance of Total Community") +
  xlab("Depth") +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 16), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text=element_text(size=12)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = category_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = category_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("4000m","3000m","2000m","1000m","500m","150m","50m")) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(ncol = 10, reverse = TRUE), 
    color = guide_legend(ncol = 10, reverse = TRUE)
  )
plot

plot2 = plot +
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(
      x = depth,
      y = total_height +1,  
      label = MAG_count
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)))

plot2
```

```{r}
ggsave(paste(rootdir, "refined_analysis/refined_figures/06152026/refined_figure2B_06152026.pdf", sep = ""), plot2, width = 17, height = 3.5, units = "in", dpi = 72)
```

```{r}
target_phyla=c("alphaproteobacteria",
                  "gammaproteobacteria",
                  "sar324",
                  "actinobacteriota",
                  "thermoproteota")

df_oc6=genome_coverage %>% 
  filter(
    site == "OC6",
    phylum_sort %in% target_phyla
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    depth = factor(depth, levels = c("4000m","3000m","2000m","1000m","500m","150m","50m")),
    taxon_label = factor(family, levels = sort(unique(family))),
    show_depth_label = ifelse(phylum_sort == target_phyla[1], TRUE, FALSE)
  )

#add in 50m for AOA so it plots correctly
if (!any(df_oc6$phylum_sort == "thermoproteota" & df_oc6$depth == "50m")) {
  df_oc6=df_oc6 %>%
    bind_rows(
      tibble(
        site = "OC6",
        phylum_sort = "thermoproteota",
        depth = factor("50m", levels = levels(df_oc6$depth)),
        family = NA_character_,
        relative = 0,
        taxon_label = NA,
        show_depth_label = FALSE
      )
    )
}

taxon_levels=rev(sort(unique(df_oc6$taxon_label)))
df_oc6=df_oc6 %>%
  mutate(taxon_label = factor(taxon_label, levels = taxon_levels))

phylum_labels=c(
  "actinobacteriota"      = "Actinobacteriota",
  "alphaproteobacteria"   = "Alphaproteobacteria",
  "gammaproteobacteria"   = "Gammaproteobacteria",
  "sar324"                = "SAR324",
  "thermoproteota"        = "Thermoproteota"
)

OC6_plot = ggplot(df_oc6, aes(x = depth, y = relative*100, fill = taxon_label, color = taxon_label)) +
  geom_bar(position = "stack", stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_grid(
    ~ phylum_sort, 
    scales = "free",
    labeller = labeller(phylum_sort = phylum_labels)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c38, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c38, drop = FALSE) +
  theme_few() +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(ncol = 9, reverse = TRUE),
    color = guide_legend(ncol = 9, reverse = TRUE)
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 16), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text=element_text(size=12)
  ) +
  ylab("Relative % Autotrophic MAG abundance of Total Community") +
  xlab("Depth (m)") +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("4000m","3000m","2000m","1000m","500m","150m","50m"))

OC6_plot

```

```{r}
ggsave(paste(rootdir, "refined_analysis/refined_figures/06152026/OC6_plot_06152026.pdf", sep = ""), width = 17, height = 4.5, units = "in", dpi = 72)
```

```{r}
fig2BC = plot2 / OC6_plot

fig2BC
```

```{r}
ggsave(paste(rootdir, "refined_analysis/refined_figures/06152026/fig2BC_06152026.pdf", sep = ""), fig2BC, width = 17, height = 11, units = "in", dpi = 72)
```

#make table 2 (-pathway found which is added in manually by referencing figure 4)

```{r}

# Calculate the true Phylum-level relative abundance per sample
phylum_abundance <- genome_coverage %>%
  group_by(kingdom, phylum, Sample) %>%
  summarise(sample_total_rel = sum(relative, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(kingdom, phylum) %>%
  summarise(
    `Mean Relative Abundance (%)` = mean(sample_total_rel, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    `Maximum Relative Abundance (%)` = max(sample_total_rel, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Calculate MAG and family counts per Phylum
phylum_meta <- genome_coverage %>%
  group_by(kingdom, phylum) %>%
  summarise(
    `Phylum* (families, n=)` = paste0(unique(phylum), " (families, n=", n_distinct(family), ")"),
    `MAGs (n=)` = n_distinct(genome),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Combine into the final summary table
summary_table <- left_join(phylum_meta, phylum_abundance, by = c("kingdom", "phylum")) %>%
  rename(Domain = kingdom) %>%
  select(
    Domain, 
    `Phylum* (families, n=)`, 
    `MAGs (n=)`, 
    `Mean Relative Abundance (%)`, 
    `Maximum Relative Abundance (%)`
  )

print(summary_table)
```

```{r}
phylum_summary <- genome_info %>%
  count(phylum, name = "MAG_count")
write.csv(x = summary_table, file = paste0(rootdir, "refined_analysis/refined_tables/table2_phylumsummary_06152026.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```
